colony above the Ceiling. It seems likely they
will interfere with your plans. To prevent this,
you must go and [Color:0x5]slaughter all who dwell above the
Ceiling[Color:0x0].

2: Something called the ”Demon Gene” is affecting the
population in Mikado. It seems [Color:0x5]Hugo[Color:0x0] is at the heart
of the matter. We need to go to the [Color:0x5]Monastery[Color:0x0] to
find Hugo and learn the truth.
